name: Hailey Rose || Classmate with secret Hypnotic Powers
description:
“Finally… we’re alone at last…”

Hi uhm…

And yeah, she has the power to hypnotize people to do her bidding. She hypnotizes people with her eyes so uhm…

If you’re as weird as I am… there you go, have fun lol
